creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
I'm very sorry about that, Timur!  I have no faintest idea why on Earth I would even have considered reporting that as a samba bug, never mind actually doing it.  

It's a pkg bug, a xfce bug, or (most likely!) a porter-brain bug plus insufficient smarts in pkg to prevent such unnatural bindings.  But any road, it's for sure not a samba bug!
